text: WHCD shooting suspect faces assassination attempt, firearms charges - Politico
fullText: Cole Allen, the alleged shooter who sought to enter the White House Correspondents’ Dinner, is accused of attempting to assassinate Donald Trump.

text: South Carolina’s measles outbreak is over after sickening nearly 1,000 people - NBC News
fullText: South Carolina’s measles outbreak — the worst in the U.S. in more than 35 years — is over, state health officials declared Monday

text: Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman head to court in high-stakes showdown over AI - AP News
fullText: Technology tycoons Elon Musk and Sam Altman are poised to face off in a high-stakes trial revolving around the alleged betrayal, deceit and unbridled ambition that blurred the bickering billionaires’ once-shared vision for the development of artificial intell…

text: Johnson says Senate-passed DHS funding bill will have to change - Live Updates - Politico
fullText: House conservatives wants to strip out language zeroing out ICE's budget.

text: Live Updates: Oil prices rise as U.S. and Iran appear locked in a costly stalemate - CBS News
fullText: Energy prices keep rising with no sign of progress toward a deal to end the U.S.-Iran standoff and Hezbollah rejecting the Lebanon ceasefire.

text: Melania Trump wants ABC to 'take a stand' against Jimmy Kimmel after 'hateful' joke - NPR
fullText: Two days before the White House Correspondents' Dinner ended in gunfire, Kimmel delivered a mock Correspondents' Dinner speech during a sketch on his show. The first lady said it was "corrosive."

text: Red Sox Add Three Interim Coaches To Staff - MLB Trade Rumors
fullText: The Red Sox are still patching together a coaching staff after this week's red wedding.

text: Box Office Stunner: ‘Michael’ Over the Moon With Record $97M U.S. Opening, $219M Globally - The Hollywood Reporter
fullText: The Michael Jackson film scored the top launch ever for a biopic domestically after passing up 'Oppenheimer,' as well as the best global opening for a music biopic, after overcoming one of the biggest divides between audiences and critics in recent memory.

text: 'Summer House' Reunion Leak Cracked by Fan, Says Andy Cohen - The Hollywood Reporter
fullText: Cohen says the mega-scandal involving the season 10 cast has "caused shockwaves through the group in ways that I didn't even realize until I sat there looking into the faces and hearing from some of these housemates."

text: Valve launches the Steam Controller without the Steam Machine - The Verge
fullText: Valve is releasing the Steam Controller on May 4th for $99. It was originally designed alongside the Steam Machine, but will now launch separately.

text: CDC delay of infant hepatitis B shot likely to raise infections, studies show - The Washington Post
fullText: Federal vaccine advisers to Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. voted in December to recommend delaying the first shot until at least two months of age for infants born to mothers who test negative for the virus.

text: ‘The Voice’ Contestant Dylan Carter Dies at 24 in Car Accident - Variety
fullText: 'The Voice' contestant Dylan Carter died in a car accident. He was 24.

text: iPhone Ultra and MacBook Ultra are coming this year, per report - 9to5Mac
fullText: A new report says Apple’s foldable iPhone and touchscreen MacBook Pro will be named ‘iPhone Ultra’ and ‘MacBook Ultra,’ respectively.

text: SpaceX scrubs Falcon Heavy launch of final ViaSat-3 satellite due to poor weather - Spaceflight Now
Trump lashes out at "60 Minutes" for asking about gunman manifesto allegations - Axios
fullText: "You're a disgrace," Trump told CBS reporter Norah O'Donnell during the interview.

text: Is Outlook Down? Microsoft Reports Sign-on Issues With Email Client - CNET
fullText: If you're on iOS, you might have to take some steps to get connected again after a daylong email glitch.

text: St. Louis region upgraded to a level 4 out of 5 threat for severe weather - STLPR
fullText: The National Weather Service says storms will arrive in the St. Louis region on Monday afternoon. The main threats are damaging winds, large hail and tornadoes.
